## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat -- new feature
- [ ] fix -- bug fix
- [ ] docs -- documentation
- [ ] refactor -- code cleanup
- [ ] test -- test changes
- [ ] chore -- maintenance

## Area

<!-- module/X, backend/X, plugin/X, lib/X, theme/X, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass (`./tests/run_tests.sh`)
- [ ] shellcheck passes
- [ ] No direct platform tool calls in modules
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(area/name): description`
